title: Eligibility for membership
doc_html:
§1789.2.  Eligibility for membership

Each person who would be eligible for membership pursuant to R.S. 11:1751 but whose first employment making him eligible for membership in this system occurred on or after January 1, 2013, shall become a member of the MERS Plan A Tier 2 of the system as a condition of employment.

Acts 2012, No. 720, §1, eff. July 1, 2012.
